unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_array_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate allocation failure hook mechanism in target Rust crate
last_errors: The source test relies on cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to simulate memory allocation failure, which has no equivalent in the target json crate. The target insert operation cannot be made to fail on allocation.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_array_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate null pointer arguments in safe Rust
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as root or key to cJSON_AddArrayToObject. Rust's safe type system prevents null references; calling insert on a non-object value returns an error but does not match the specific null-check behavior. The null key case has no safe equivalent.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_bool_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate allocation failure hook mechanism in target Rust crate
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to trigger allocation failure; no equivalent in the target crate.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_bool_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate null pointer arguments in safe Rust
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as root or key to cJSON_AddBoolToObject; safe Rust cannot represent null pointers. Partial coverage (non-object insertion) does not match the exact null-check expected behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_false_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate allocation failure hook mechanism in target Rust crate
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks); no equivalent in target.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_false_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate null pointer arguments in safe Rust
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as root or key to cJSON_AddFalseToObject; safe Rust cannot represent null pointers.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_null_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot simulate allocation failure
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to make allocations fail. The target crate has no equivalent global memory hook mechanism. Cannot replicate allocation failure scenario using available aligned target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_null_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot pass null pointers
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as the object pointer or NULL as the key string to AddNullToObject. The target Rust APIs require valid references for the object and key; there is no way to pass null pointers. Cannot replicate null pointer handling.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_number_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot simulate allocation failure
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to make allocations fail. The target crate has no equivalent global memory hook mechanism. Cannot replicate allocation failure scenario using available aligned target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_number_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot pass null pointers
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as the object pointer or NULL as the key string to AddNumberToObject. The target Rust APIs require valid references for the object and key; there is no way to pass null pointers. Cannot replicate null pointer handling.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_object_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot simulate allocation failure
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to make allocations fail. The target crate has no equivalent global memory hook mechanism. Cannot replicate allocation failure scenario using available aligned target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_object_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot pass null pointers
last_errors: The source test passes NULL as the object pointer or NULL as the key string to AddObjectToObject. The target Rust APIs require valid references for the object and key; there is no way to pass null pointers. Cannot replicate null pointer handling.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_raw_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot simulate allocation failure
last_errors: The source test uses cJSON_InitHooks(&failing_hooks) to make allocations fail. The target crate has no equivalent global memory hook mechanism. Cannot replicate allocation failure scenario using available aligned target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_raw_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source functions do not include the function under test (cJSON_AddRawToObject), making it impossible to reproduce the expected null-pointer failure behavior without a corresponding target API.
last_errors: The case's aligned_source_functions only contain cJSON_CreateObject, but the test predominantly tests cJSON_AddRawToObject with null arguments. No target API exists to add raw JSON content to an object, and the allocation failure hooks are not available. Without a target function for AddRawToObject, the observable behavior cannot be replayed.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_string_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: The test relies on cJSON_InitHooks to inject allocation failures, which has no target counterpart. The aligned source functions only include cJSON_CreateObject.
last_errors: The expected behavior is failure under allocation failure, simulated via hooks. The target API does not support custom allocators or injection of allocation failures, so the test cannot be replicated.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_string_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source functions only include cJSON_CreateObject; the test focuses on cJSON_AddStringToObject with null pointers. No target API for adding strings to objects.
last_errors: Same as case 2, the primary function under test is not aligned. Cannot reproduce null-pointer behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_true_should_add_true
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source functions (cJSON_CreateObject, cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive) do not include cJSON_AddTrueToObject. No target API to add a boolean value to an object.
last_errors: The test requires adding a true value to an object, then retrieving it. Without an add_true method, the test setup is impossible.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_true_should_fail_on_allocation_failure
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Relies on cJSON_InitHooks for allocation failure; no target equivalent. Aligned source functions only include cJSON_CreateObject.
last_errors: Cannot simulate allocation failure in target. Test cannot be replayed.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_true_should_fail_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source functions only include cJSON_CreateObject; test focuses on cJSON_AddTrueToObject with null pointers.
last_errors: No target for AddTrueToObject. Cannot reproduce.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_compare_should_compare_invalid_as_not_equal
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot create an invalid/uninitialized JsonValue in target Rust API. Rust's JsonValue is an enum with fixed variants; no equivalent to a stack-allocated, zero-filled cJSON struct.
last_errors: Source test uses memset to zero a cJSON on stack and compares it with itself expecting false. In target, any valid JsonValue compared to itself with eq returns true. No target API supports creating an invalid state.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_add_item_to_object_or_array_should_not_add_itself
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot safely attempt to add a JsonValue to itself due to Rust ownership and borrow rules. The source test checks that adding an object to itself returns false, but in safe Rust it is impossible to pass the same object as both the container and the item because insert and push take ownership of the item.
last_errors: Target APIs JsonValue::insert and JsonValue::push require a value that is moved into the container. Self-referencing would require aliasing and mutable borrowing that violates Rust's borrow checker. No equivalent runtime check exists.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_compare_should_not_accept_invalid_types
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot construct a JsonValue with an invalid type flag (e.g., cJSON_Number | cJSON_String). Rust's JsonValue enforces variant discriminant at compile time.
last_errors: Source test creates a cJSON with type = cJSON_Number | cJSON_String (invalid combination) and expects cJSON_Compare to return false. Target JsonValue is an enum with fixed variants; there is no way to create a value with a mixed or invalid variant. The target API cannot express the source scenario without inventing behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_create_array_reference_should_create_an_array_reference
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not support creating references to array items; internal pointer comparisons not expressible through public API.
last_errors: The source test creates an array reference using cJSON_CreateArrayReference and directly compares internal child pointers and type flags. The Rust target public API provides no equivalent for creating references or inspecting internal pointers. The aligned source functions (cJSON_CreateArray, cJSON_AddItemToArray, cJSON_IsArray, cJSON_IsNumber) alone cannot reproduce the core behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_create_object_reference_should_create_an_object_reference
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not support creating references to object items; internal pointer comparisons not expressible through public API.
last_errors: Similar to array reference case: the source test uses cJSON_CreateObjectReference and checks child pointer and type flags. The Rust target has no API for creating references or accessing internal links. Aligned functions (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS, cJSON_CreateObject, cJSON_IsNumber, cJSON_IsObject) do not cover this behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: cjson_functions_should_not_crash_with_null_pointers
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Rust's type system prevents passing null pointers as function arguments, making direct null-safety checks inexpressible
last_errors: The source test exercises many public API functions with null pointers and expects graceful handling (returning false, null, etc.). Rust's target APIs take references (&self, &str) that cannot be null; the behavior of calling with null is not representable without unsafe code. Functions like cJSON_IsNumber(NULL) cannot be translated because Rust does not permit calling methods on null references. The required internal public substitution (add_item_to_array -> push) is also impacted because push cannot be called on a null array. This fundamental type-system difference prevents faithful replay.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: generate_merge_tests
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: missing source data: merges array not provided
last_errors: The source test loops over an array 'merges' which is not available in the test definition. Without this data, the expected output cannot be derived. Additionally, the test uses cJSONUtils_GenerateMergePatch and cJSONUtils_MergePatch which are not in the aligned source functions. Cannot generate a replay that matches the source behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.name: merge_tests
unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: missing source data: merges array not provided
last_errors: The source test loops over an array 'merges' which is not available. The test also uses cJSONUtils_MergePatch which is not aligned. Cannot reproduce the expected string comparison from the source test.

summary.note: public_replay_pass_rate only describes this replay plan; compare replay_plan_fingerprint across runs before comparing pass rates.

source_test_evidence_coverage.description: 3A aligned source 函数中，有 src 测试证据的比例

precise_behavior_evidence_rate.description: public source 函数中，从 leaf-name 测试证据进一步确认有精确行为证据的比例

source_tested_public_function_replay_gap.description: L1 scope 中有精确 src 测试证据但 adapter 未 replay 的 source 函数比例

public_replay_pass_rate.description: 当前已生成 replay plan 内，public replay 通过的 event 数 / public replay 实际执行的 event 数；这是 scoped pass rate，不代表全部 eligible source behavior cases 的全局通过率

aligned_source_replay_coverage.description: L1 source scope 中被 replay 覆盖且通过 3A 对齐验证的 source 函数比例

aligned_target_replay_coverage.description: L1 target scope 中被 replay 触达且通过 3A 对齐验证的 target 函数比例

behavior_case_accounting_rate.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，已 replay 或明确标记为无法转换的比例

behavior_case_replay_coverage.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，成功转换为 replay event 并进入 Rust replay plan 的比例
